official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for constructing the Play clientbound projectile_power primitive fixture.
Official binary source for the entity id plus acceleration power body codec.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and projectile_power packet id.

field_notes.entity_id: Primitive entity id fixture; does not prove projectile entity existence.
field_notes.acceleration_power: Primitive double fixture; does not prove projectile acceleration behavior.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound projectile_power packet framing and dispatch/decode for one primitive entity id plus accelerationPower fixture only; do not infer projectile entity existence, acceleration behavior, world state, or client-load completion.
